stimulus: That the deepest known cave system on Earth lay in the country of Georgia was accepted by every speleologist consulted ______ pinpointing the exact bottom of the Veryovkina cave required several additional expeditions.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The semicolon correctly joins the first main clause ("That the…thereafter") with the second main clause ("pinpointing…expeditions"). A semicolon is especially appropriate when joining two parallel statements where the second contrasts with the first.

Choice A is incorrect because it produces a comma splice. Choice C is incorrect because a colon would suggest that the second clause explains or amplifies the first; here the second clause contrasts with the first. Choice D is incorrect because it creates a run-on sentence with the two clauses fused.
